---
title: "Transcutaneous vagus nerve stimulation via tragus or cymba conchae: Are its psychophysiological effects dependent on the stimulation area?"

pub-authors:
  - Borges
  - Pfannenstiel
  - Tsukahara
  - Laborde
  - Klatt
  - Raab

pub-year: "2021"
date: "2021-01-01"
venue: "International Journal of Psychophysiology"
pub-type: "Empirical Article"
pub-status: "Published"

pdf: "/publications/2021/ijp-vagus-pupil/Borges_et_al_2021_International_Journal_of_Psychophysiology.pdf"
data: ""
code: ""
doi: "10.1016/j.ijpsycho.2021.01.003"
link: ""

listing-page: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>.quarto-title-meta { display: none !important; } .quarto-title-block .abstract { display: none !important; }</style>
---

{{< include ../../../assets/_meta-publication.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_download-buttons.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_pdf-viewer.qmd >}}
